purpose: Thin per-deposit INDEX into the recovered external metadata for this deposit's legacy Zenodo DOIs. Phase 3.5 title-match backfill: registry's zenodo_dois field was empty; legacy DOIs recovered via title-match against existing data stores (OpenAlex, Zenodo bulk XML, DataCite backup, DataCite survivor sweep).

10.5281/zenodo.19099674.title: THE MEANING LAYER IS NOW WRITABLE

openalex.lookup: records[].doi == this DOI; openalex_id is the W-prefixed OpenAlex Work ID

zenodo_bulk_xml.lookup: extract <record_id>.xml from the tarball where record_id is the digits after 'zenodo.'

datacite_survivor_sweep.lookup: search records[].attributes.doi == this DOI across orcid_records, name_records, sigil_records, vox_records, feist_records

rescue_provenance.rationale: Registry's zenodo_dois field was empty for this deposit. Title matched (first 12 normalized words) against existing recovery data stores. DOIs added to registry's zenodo_dois field; sidecar created; resolution index updated.
